data.body: DONE — public oracle API shipped (commit d085e8cf). All 4 ACs: (1) three query surfaces over Engine A/T0/Engine B (oracle.refute_absence unifies the lanes incl. dependency→T0; applies(dimension); scan(detectors/dimensions/path_globs)) returning the evidence model+coverage; (2) typed signatures + closed dimension vocab OWNED here (DIMENSIONS_VERSION=1, registry mirrors it CI-guarded), reference schema only exposed (defined in S2); (3) read-only CLI/library/MCP grounding-info tool + grounding_info.schema.json in OUTPUT_SCHEMAS + driven by schema-coverage & MCP-coverage guards; (4) docs/grounding.md + CLAUDE.md Reads list + docs/output-schemas.md refreshed. 198 guard + 18 oracle tests pass; mypy clean. CODE REVIEW (subagent): fixed a BLOCKER (refute_absence raised on a malformed reference — now fails open to abstain(invalid_detector)); facade routing/dimension-consistency/read-tool wiring VERIFIED sound. Closing.
